payload.answer: Duplicate Slack delivery detected; no new memory should be committed from the retry alone.

entity_resolution.reason: Input states the same Slack event ID was delivered twice; treat as retry/idempotency context rather than a distinct durable fact to add again.

details: No durable memory card emitted to avoid duplicating the fact.
